# AddMediaMediaItemResolutionResult.Unsupported

**Object**

The reason your service can’t add the media item to the user’s library or to a playlist.

## Declaration

```swift
object AddMediaMediaItemResolutionResult.Unsupported
```

## Discussion

If you can’t find the media item the user specifies, don’t provide a reason. When the client receives an [doc://com.apple.sirikitcloudmedia/documentation/SiriKitCloudMedia/AddMediaMediaItemResolutionResult/Unsupported-data.dictionary] object without a reason, the client provides a generic failure message to the user.

## Reporting a Problem

- **AddMediaMediaItemUnsupportedReason**: Reasons the media service can’t add the media item to the user’s library or to a playlist.
